title: {YTP} ~ 24 Vision
description:
CW: Spiders, Dogs

The creation of this video was streamed over the course of 24 hours, during which time viewers collectively raised $500 benefiting The Trevor Project. Huge thank you to everyone who gave me permission to edit them, those who watched, and those who donated!

The Trevor Project: https://www.thetrevorproject.org
